mapper.select: SELECT c.coupang_sale_id, c.upload_id, c.year_month, c.order_amount, c.service_fee, c.payment_fee, c.delivery_fee, c.instant_discount, c.coupon_discount, c.ad_fee FROM coupang_sales c JOIN upload u ON c.upload_id = u.upload_id WHERE u.store_id = #{storeId} AND c.year_month = TRUNC(#{yearMonth}, 'MM')
mapper.insert:
SELECT coupang_sales_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO coupang_sales (coupang_sale_id, upload_id, year_month, order_amount, service_fee, payment_fee, delivery_fee, instant_discount, coupon_discount, ad_fee) VALUES (#{coupangSaleId}, #{uploadId}, #{yearMonth}, #{orderAmount}, #{serviceFee}, #{paymentFee}, #{deliveryFee}, #{instantDiscount}, #{couponDiscount}, #{adFee})
